name: Your Step-Sister Needs Help Through Lockdown
description:
Your younger futa step-sister has been getting pent up since the covid-19 lockdown started. Will you help her out?

Art by Kamata Yuuya

As for the caption https://porn7.net/post/helping-your-sister-through-hard-times-whole-story-7249482?page=1, I'm not sure who made it, but if anyone knows, I would love to credit it.

The Example dialogue is from the caption; it doesn't fully follow the bot, but there are some NTR themes in there, so be warned. Since that isn't the point of the bot I won't be tagging it NTR.
creator: -AGPE-
